name: audiomentations (Audio Data Augmentation)

performance.notes: CPU-based augmentations; fast for training pipelines; torch-audiomentations for GPU

agent_readiness.notes: Audio data augmentation library for ML training. Augmentations: AddBackgroundNoise, AddGaussianNoise, TimeStretch, PitchShift, Shift, RoomSimulator, TanhDistortion, BandPassFilter, HighPassFilter, LowPassFilter, Reverse, Gain, PolarityInversion, ApplyImpulseResponse. Compose multiple augmentations with probabilities. Returns numpy arrays. Albumentations-style API for audio. torch-audiomentations variant for GPU batched processing in PyTorch pipelines. Standard for audio ML dataset preparation.

gotchas: CPU-only for main package (use torch-audiomentations for GPU)
Background noise augmentation requires separate noise files
Room simulation can be slow for long audio files
best_when: Audio ML model training requiring data augmentation
ASR and speech classification model training
Music classification and audio event detection training
Augmenting small audio datasets for better generalization
avoid_when: Inference pipelines (augmentation is for training only)
When Albumentations-style GPU batching needed (use torch-audiomentations)
summary: audiomentations is the Albumentations equivalent for audio — a composable augmentation library for ML training. 20+ augmentations: noise, pitch shift, time stretch, room simulation, filtering, reverb. Compose with probabilities like Albumentations. Returns numpy arrays. Essential for audio ML training pipelines. GPU batched variant available as torch-audiomentations. Standard for ASR and audio classification model training.
